S.FORM: rrgyax na Hhagay ga maki Taywan tesazing wagiq na rgyax.
S.PHON: rrɣjax na ħħaɣaj ɣa maki tajwan tes~ɕaziŋ waɣiq na rɣjax.

S.PHON: rrɣjax na ħħaɣaj ɣa maki tajwan tes~ɕaziŋ waɣiq na rɣjax.
